name: property managers handling 10-20 tenant requests/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 tenant requests/month, inefficient coordination causes tenant dissatisfaction. We provide a maintenance scheduling bot instead of manual scheduling via email or phone calls.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10-20 tenant requests/month, inefficient coordination causes tenant dissatisfaction. We provide a maintenance scheduling bot instead of manual scheduling via email or phone calls.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual scheduling via email or phone calls
